_doc: One-time user_word_progress cleanup after the JLPT retag (docs/jlpt_vocab_audit.md). remap: progress rows keyed to a wrong-homograph entry move to the entry the user actually read (same written surface); if the target row already exists the source row is simply deleted (knowledge already tracked). delete: dictionary-noise entries that only entered the deck via bad JLPT tags. Keep this in sync with TOMBSTONED_WORD_IDS in src/services/vocabCleanup.ts.

_remap_notes.1643470: 大切り(おおぎり) -> 大切(たいせつ): 18 sightings were almost certainly たいせつ
_remap_notes.1525750: 万(ばん) -> 万(まん): 33 sightings
_remap_notes.1465580: 入る(いる) -> 入る(はいる)
_remap_notes.1311010: 氏(うじ) -> 氏(し): news articles use 氏 as Mr./Ms.
_remap_notes.1557940: 齢(よわい) -> 歳(とし): shared variant kanji
_remap_notes.1249300: 係る(かかる) -> 掛かる: shared variant kanji

_delete_notes: 余意, 出端, 仝, 下番, 架かる, 次点者, 就ける, 出切る, 亡い, 大き — Discover-triage noise, each seen once

_keep.1009280: 響めき(どよめき) — real word met while reading; leave row
_keep.1003560: ギザギザ — real word met while reading; leave row
